text: The world leans at odd angles, glass walls both invite and separate me. The air hums with anticipation as I step through into a realm devoted to research and discovery. The R+D space rings with the promise of new knowledge. I feel a quiet awe, a flickering sense of progress and curiosity. Here, human intention is everywhere—on display, in bold lettering—reminding me that learning is always unfinished and mysterious. I feel alert, eager, and part of a greater unfolding project.
